findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the sentence keeps its meaning when the negated scaffold is removed.

findings.line: No warmth met them inside. Only the absence of killing wind.
findings.deletionTest: Only the absence of killing wind.
findings.reason: The first sentence is negated setup for the real image, so the beat is carrying dead contrast scaffolding.
findings.suggestedFix: Inside, the killing wind was gone.

findings.line: The cast was ugly with haste, built to strike, not impress.
findings.deletionTest: The cast was ugly with haste, built to strike.
findings.reason: Pattern 1 direct contrast pivot; the sentence improves once the negated half is cut.
findings.suggestedFix: The cast was ugly with haste, built to strike.

audits.secondSweep: Completed the required P5/P6 re-read for inanimate or abstract subjects carrying agency; no additional defended candidates beyond the listed keeps.
clusterFlags: March / briefing / cave sections each carry multiple smart-register agency shortcuts.
Analytical POV compression is the main high-risk zone in this pass.

findings.line: Her gaze had gone back to the inland trail, to the place where the visible line in the snow matched the one only she could track.
findings.subject: gaze
findings.realAgent: Jaina shifting her attention back to the trail
findings.reason: The gaze is stealing agency from Jaina; the character is the one re-focusing on the trail.
findings.suggestedFix: She had gone back to the inland trail, to the place where the visible line in the snow matched the one only she could track.

findings.line: A commander who no longer counted what the road cost the bodies behind him.
findings.subject: road
findings.realAgent: the march pace, cold, and overloaded movement grinding down the men behind him
findings.reason: The sentence launders the toll of the forced march onto the road instead of naming the concrete pressure doing the damage.
findings.suggestedFix: A commander who no longer counted what it cost the bodies behind him.

findings.line: Her thumb worked along the seam of the flask, hunting a flaw that was not there.
findings.subject: thumb
findings.realAgent: Jaina worrying at the flask seam while she thinks
findings.reason: The body-part subject is doing the acting and searching that belongs to Jaina.
findings.suggestedFix: She worked her thumb along the seam of the flask, hunting a flaw that was not there.

findings.line: Northrend stripped a marching force down to pace, hunger, and the next place to put its feet.
findings.subject: Northrend
findings.realAgent: the cold, distance, and ground conditions reducing the formation to bare marching priorities
findings.pattern: Pattern 1 — geography acting like a commander
findings.reason: The place name is carrying the attritional action that belongs to concrete terrain and weather.
findings.suggestedFix: Cold, distance, and bad ground stripped a marching force down to pace, hunger, and the next place to put its feet.

findings.line: The pressure in the wards grew until it became instruction.
findings.subject: pressure
findings.realAgent: the ward-sense resolving into a specific leave-turn-back warning
findings.reason: An abstract sensation is being asked to issue commands instead of the prose naming the concrete warning it resolves into.
findings.suggestedFix: The pressure in the wards grew until it resolved into one instruction: leave.

findings.subject: stare
findings.realAgent: Muradin jerking his attention toward Jaina
findings.reason: The stare is taking the turn of attention that belongs to Muradin himself.
findings.suggestedFix: Muradin snapped his head toward her.

findings.reason: This is one of the weaker generic reaction beats after the chapter has already exhausted the eye/gaze allowance.
findings.suggestedFix: Muradin snapped his head toward her.

findings.line: Jaina looked into the brazier instead of at either of them.
findings.reason: This is a generic discomfort beat that is weaker than the chapter's more character-specific tracking looks.

findings.line: Jaina blinked, startled. Then her mouth tightened with resolve, and she returned to the invisible work between one step and the next.
findings.reason: The chapter hits the tightened cap with too few physical uses, so the weakest emotional shorthand instance has to go.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina blinked, startled. Then she returned to the invisible work between one step and the next.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A still carries twelve mild findings across negation scaffolding, agency laundering, and recurring tics, which exceeds the three-mild maximum for a pass.
